Global (All).title: US-China Trade Relations Tension Escalates
Global (All).summary: The Biden administration imposes new export controls on China, escalating tensions between the two countries.

Global (All).title: Global Cyber Attack Disrupts Supply Chains
Global (All).summary: A widespread ransomware attack targets multiple industries, causing disruptions to global supply chains.

Global (All).title: Rising Tensions Between Ukraine and Russia
Global (All).summary: The situation between Ukraine and Russia remains unstable, with both sides accusing each other of provocations.

United States.title: US Supreme Court Blocks Biden's Student Loan Forgiveness Plan
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court has blocked President Biden's plan to cancel up to $20,000 in student loan debt for millions of Americans. The court's decision is a major blow to the Biden administration's effort to address the growing student loan crisis.

United States.title: Gun violence in US: Texas school shooting leaves 2 students injured
United States.summary: A gunman opened fire at a Texas school, injuring two students and leaving many others shaken. The incident highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence in the US and the need for stricter gun control laws.

United States.title: US and Iran Tensions Escalate Over Drone Incident
United States.summary: Tensions between the US and Iran have escalated over a reported drone incident in the Persian Gulf. Iran claims the US drone entered its airspace, while the US says it was over international waters.

South Korea.title: NK Tests Missile Capable of Attacking US Bases in Asia: Seoul
South Korea.summary: North Korean missile test puts South Korea under threat.

South Korea.title: South Korean Navy Accidentally Fires Warning Shots at US Plane
South Korea.summary: Incident raises concerns about military cooperation between allies.

South Korea.title: Korea Braces for Omicron XE, Omicron BA.2.3.2 Variants Outbreak
South Korea.summary: South Korea ramps up measures to combat COVID-19.

Japan.title: Tokyo confirms over 1,600 COVID-19 cases on July 13, with a record high of 3,008 cases in total for the month, spurring concerns of a fourth wave of infections.
Japan.summary: COVID-19 cases surge in Tokyo, prompting concerns of a fourth wave of infections. Hospitals are under intense pressure, and the government is considering measures to control the spread.

Japan.title: Japan's government extends virus emergency for 30 days amid surge in cases.
Japan.summary: Japan's government extends the state of emergency for a further 30 days due to increasing COVID-19 cases. This measure is aimed at mitigating the spread of the virus.

Japan.title: Aichi governor says 'difficult to predict' when state of emergency will be lifted.
Japan.summary: The governor of Aichi said it's challenging to determine when the state of emergency can be lifted due to the rising number of COVID-19 cases. The government is working to contain the virus spread.
